description: Use this API to delete a single bus from a bus subsystem. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.4.0. ierr = bsysdelo(sid, busnum)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Valid bus subsystem id. valid bus subsystem ids range from 0 to 11. (input).

parameters.name: busnum
parameters.description: Bus number to delete from the subsystem. (input).
